'''Ogl'woxz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who worked on "[[Durge/Legends|Project Durge]]" at [[The Warren (Dantooine)|the Warren]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
